# Trent Peek — trentpeek.com

> Two-time founder and applied-AI builder, Nottingham UK. Runs Gardn Labs — a consumer AI app live on the App Store and Google Play in 20 markets and 13 languages — with day-to-day company operations run by 30+ governed AI agent roles (approval queues, earned autonomy, spend caps, audit trails). Co-founder of Woodlark Associates (applied-AI consultancy) with Richard Ardis. Inventor of the Fragility–Autonomy Matrix (autonomy tiers Report/Suggest/Do × Low/Medium/High fragility).

Key facts (self-audited, demonstrable on screen-share):
- First opened a coding tool 16 April 2026; everything below shipped since, AI-orchestrated under governance he designed.
- ~640,000 lines of shipped code, 899 automated test files, three production repos; 3,571 passing tests in the ops repo alone.
- Previously: co-founder & CEO, We Are Fulfilment (VC-backed 3PL; £1.3m → £3.25m → £4.8m revenue over three years; five institutional rounds; FEBE Growth 100; placed into administration March 2026). Before that: BDM to Group Managing Director, CCM Group (projected £12m turnover, 401% growth on 2017).

- https://trentpeek.com/ — overview, the Fragility–Autonomy Matrix (interactive)

- https://trentpeek.com/contact.html — contact (hello@trentpeek.com)
